# Element Swimming

Element Swimming provides swimming coaching and tailored swimming services in the Czech Republic and online.

## Canonical pages

- Czech: https://www.elementswimming.cz/
- English: https://www.elementswimming.cz/index_en.html

## Business facts

- Name: Element Swimming
- Founded: 2019
- Founder: Dominik Vavrečka
- Services: individual swimming lessons, lessons for pairs, group lessons, lessons for nonswimmers, swimming technique analysis, online consultations
- Locations served: Prague/Praha, Brno, Ostrava, Olomouc, Mladá Boleslav, Online
- Coaches: certified ČSPS coaches
- Contact email: elementswimming@gmail.com
- Phone: +420 725 956 042
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/elementswimming_cz/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dominik-vavrečka-1a272a145/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@elementswimming8589

## Founder

Dominik Vavrečka founded Element Swimming. The website states that he is a multiple Czech National Championships medalist, a participant in European and World Championships, and a coach at the University Sports Centre Victoria.

## Prices

Prices are listed on the website as valid from 1.1.2026.

- Prague/Praha: individual lessons from 999 Kč/hour, pair lessons from 1199 Kč/hour, group lessons from 1499 Kč/hour, nonswimmer lessons from 1199 Kč/hour, technique analysis 2999 Kč
- Brno: individual lessons 799 Kč/hour, pair lessons 899 Kč/hour, group lessons from 999 Kč/hour, nonswimmer lessons 899 Kč/hour, technique analysis 2499 Kč
- Ostrava: individual lessons 749 Kč/hour, pair lessons 799 Kč/hour, group lessons from 899 Kč/hour, nonswimmer lessons 799 Kč/hour, technique analysis 2499 Kč
- Olomouc: individual lessons 649 Kč/hour, pair lessons 699 Kč/hour, group lessons from 799 Kč/hour, nonswimmer lessons 799 Kč/hour, technique analysis 2499 Kč
- Mladá Boleslav: individual lessons 799 Kč/hour, pair lessons 899 Kč/hour, group lessons from 999 Kč/hour, nonswimmer lessons 899 Kč/hour, technique analysis 2499 Kč
- Online: consultations from 199 Kč/hour

## Booking

The website links to Google Forms for booking a training session and buying a voucher. Visitors can also contact Element Swimming by email, phone, Instagram, LinkedIn, or YouTube.
